examples.sentence: 日本へ来たのに、一度も富士山を見ずじまいで帰国してしまった。
examples.translation: I came to Japan but ended up going home without ever getting to see Mt. Fuji.
examples.translationEn: I came to Japan but ended up going home without ever getting to see Mt. Fuji
examples.romaji: Nihon e kita noni, ichidomo Fuji-san o mizu jimai de kikoku shite shimatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I came to Japan but ended up going home without ever getting to see Mt. Fuji

examples.sentence: 出張のため、彼女に会わずじまいだった。
examples.translation: Because I was on a business trip, I ended up not meeting her.
examples.translationEn: Because I was on a business trip, I ended up not meeting her
examples.romaji: Shucchō no tame, kanojo ni awazu jimai datta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Because I was on a business trip, I ended up not meeting her

examples.sentence: 昨日は疲れすぎて、宿題をせずじまいだ。
examples.translation: I was too tired yesterday and ended up not doing my homework.
examples.translationEn: I was too tired yesterday and ended up not doing my homework
examples.romaji: Kinō wa tsukare-sugite, shukudai o sezu jimai da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I was too tired yesterday and ended up not doing my homework

examples.sentence: 着物を買ったが、結局、一度も着ずじまいだ。
examples.translation: I bought a kimono, but in the end, I never got the chance to wear it.
examples.translationEn: I bought a kimono, but in the end, I never got the chance to wear it
examples.romaji: Kimono o katta ga, kekkyoku, ichido mo kizu jimai da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I bought a kimono, but in the end, I never got the chance to wear it

examples.sentence: 朝ごはんを食べずとも、働くことができます。
examples.translation: Even without eating breakfast, I can work.
examples.translationEn: Even without eating breakfast, I can work
examples.romaji: Asagohan o tabezu tomo, hataraku koto ga dekimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even without eating breakfast, I can work

examples.sentence: 車がなくとも、バスで行くことができます。
examples.translation: Even without a car, you can go by bus.
examples.translationEn: Even without a car, you can go by bus
examples.romaji: Kuruma ga nakutomo, basu de iku koto ga dekimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even without a car, you can go by bus

examples.sentence: お金がなくとも、幸せになれる。
examples.translation: Even without money, one can be happy.
examples.translationEn: Even without money, one can be happy
examples.romaji: Okane ga nakutomo, shiawase ni nareru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even without money, one can be happy

examples.sentence: インターネットがなくとも、情報を得る方法はいくつかあります。
examples.translation: Even without the internet, there are several ways to obtain information.
examples.translationEn: Even without the internet, there are several ways to obtain information
examples.romaji: Intānetto ga nakutomo, jōhō o eru hōhō wa ikutsu ka arimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even without the internet, there are several ways to obtain information

examples.sentence: 彼が困っていると聞いたら、助けずにはおかない。
examples.translation: If I hear he is in trouble, I cannot help but assist him.
examples.translationEn: If I hear he is in trouble, I cannot help but assist him
examples.romaji: Kare ga komatte iru to kiitara, tasukezuni wa okanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I hear he is in trouble, I cannot help but assist him

examples.sentence: 食事の準備がこのままだと、手伝わずにはおかないだろう。
examples.translation: If the meal prep stays like this, I won't be able to stop myself from helping.
examples.translationEn: If the meal prep stays like this, I wont be able to stop myself from helping
examples.romaji: Shokuji no junbi ga kono mama da to, tetsudawazuni wa okanai darō.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If the meal prep stays like this, I wont be able to stop myself from helping

examples.sentence: この問題が解決しないなら、改善策を考えずにはおかない。
examples.translation: If this issue isn't resolved, I can't help but think of a solution.
examples.translationEn: If this issue isnt resolved, I cant help but think of a solution
examples.romaji: Kono mondai ga kaiketsu shinai nara, kaizen-saku o kangaezuni wa okanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If this issue isnt resolved, I cant help but think of a solution

examples.sentence: 彼女が泣いているのを見たら、慰めずにはおかない。
examples.translation: When I see her crying, I cannot help but comfort her.
examples.translationEn: When I see her crying, I cannot help but comfort her
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga naite iru no o mitara, nagusamezuni wa okanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: When I see her crying, I cannot help but comfort her

examples.sentence: この問題を解決しないと、社会全体が影響を受けるので、解決せずにはすまない。
examples.translation: Since this issue will affect the entire society if not resolved, we cannot do without solving it.
examples.translationEn: Since this issue will affect the entire society if not resolved, we cannot do without solving it
examples.romaji: Kono mondai o kaiketsu shinai to, shakai zentai ga eikyō o ukeru node, kaiketsu sezu ni wa sumanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since this issue will affect the entire society if not resolved, we cannot do without solving it

examples.sentence: これは子供たちの未来を思うと、教育改革を行わずにはすまないことだ。
examples.translation: For the sake of the children’s future, we cannot avoid carrying out educational reforms.
examples.translationEn: For the sake of the children’s future, we cannot avoid carrying out educational reforms
examples.romaji: Kore wa kodomo-tachi no mirai o omou to, kyōiku kaikaku o okonawazu ni wa sumanai koto da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: For the sake of the children’s future, we cannot avoid carrying out educational reforms

examples.sentence: この件については、彼に謝らずにはすまない。
examples.translation: Regarding this matter, I can’t do without apologizing to him.
examples.translationEn: Regarding this matter, I can’t do without apologizing to him
examples.romaji: Kono ken ni tsuite wa, kare ni ayamarazu ni wa sumanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Regarding this matter, I can’t do without apologizing to him

examples.sentence: 結婚式に出席するなら、プレゼントを渡さずにはすまない。
examples.translation: If you attend a wedding, you have to bring a gift.
examples.translationEn: If you attend a wedding, you have to bring a gift
examples.romaji: Kekkonshiki ni shusseki suru nara, purezento o watasazu ni wa sumanai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If you attend a wedding, you have to bring a gift

examples.sentence: 彼はそんなに早く走れそうにない。
examples.translation: He doesn't seem likely to run that fast.
examples.translationEn: He doesnt seem likely to run that fast
examples.romaji: Kare wa sonna ni hayaku hashire sō ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He doesnt seem likely to run that fast

examples.sentence: この書類を明日までに終わりそうにない。
examples.translation: It doesn’t seem like I’ll be able to finish these documents by tomorrow.
examples.translationEn: It doesn’t seem like I’ll be able to finish these documents by tomorrow
examples.romaji: Kono shorui o ashita made ni owarisō ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It doesn’t seem like I’ll be able to finish these documents by tomorrow

examples.sentence: 今日雨が降りそうにない。
examples.translation: It doesn't look like it will rain today.
examples.translationEn: It doesnt look like it will rain today
examples.romaji: Kyō ame ga furisō ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It doesnt look like it will rain today

examples.sentence: 彼女は間違えそうにない。
examples.translation: She doesn’t seem likely to make a mistake.
examples.translationEn: She doesn’t seem likely to make a mistake
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa machigae sō ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She doesn’t seem likely to make a mistake

examples.sentence: 今日中に仕事を終えそうもない。
examples.translation: It doesn't seem like I'll finish my work today.
examples.translationEn: It doesnt seem like Ill finish my work today
examples.romaji: Kyōjū ni shigoto o oesō mo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It doesnt seem like Ill finish my work today

examples.sentence: 雨が止みそうもない。

examples.romaji: Ame ga yamisō mo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It doesnt seem like the rain will stop

examples.sentence: 彼が約束を守りそうもない。
examples.translation: It doesn't seem like he will keep his promise.

examples.sentence: この難しい問題は解決しそうもない。

examples.translation: As soon as I clean, the kids mess it up.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I clean, the kids mess it up

examples.translation: As soon as we solve that, another problem arises.

examples.sentence: 眠りにつくそばから電話が鳴った。

examples.sentence: 彼が一度怒ったが最後、誰も彼を止めることはできません。
examples.translation: Once he gets angry, no one can stop him.
examples.translationEn: Once he gets angry, no one can stop him
examples.romaji: Kare ga ichido okotta ga saigo, dare mo kare o tomeru koto wa dekimasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Once he gets angry, no one can stop him

examples.sentence: このゲームを始めたが最後、一晩中やり続けた。
examples.translation: As soon as I started this game, I played it all night.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I started this game, I played it all night

examples.sentence: 彼女が部屋を出たが最後、二度と戻ってこなかった。
examples.translation: The moment she left the room, she never came back.
examples.translationEn: The moment she left the room, she never came back
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga heya o deta ga saigo, nido to modotte konakatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The moment she left the room, she never came back

examples.sentence: 私がその橋を渡ったが最後、それが最後の別れだった。
examples.translation: Once I crossed that bridge, it was our final goodbye.
examples.translationEn: Once I crossed that bridge, it was our final goodbye
examples.romaji: Watashi ga sono hashi o watatta ga saigo, sore ga saigo no wakare datta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Once I crossed that bridge, it was our final goodbye

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たことにしてください
examples.sentence: 昨日のことは忘れたことにしてください。
examples.translation: Please act as if you have forgotten about yesterday.
examples.translationEn: Please act as if you have forgotten about yesterday
examples.romaji: Kinou no koto wa wasureta koto ni shite kudasai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Please act as if you have forgotten about yesterday

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たことにしてください
examples.sentence: 私がここに来たことを誰にも言わないで、秘密にしたことにしてください。
examples.translation: Please don't tell anyone that I came here; act as if it’s a secret.
examples.translationEn: Please dont tell anyone that I came here; act as if it’s a secret
examples.romaji: Watashi ga koko ni kita koto o dare ni mo iwanaide, himitsu ni shita koto ni shite kudasai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Please dont tell anyone that I came here; act as if it’s a secret

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たことにしてください
examples.sentence: 彼が間違えたと思ったことにしてください。
examples.translation: Please pretend that you think he made a mistake.
examples.translationEn: Please pretend that you think he made a mistake
examples.romaji: Kare ga machigaeta to omotta koto ni shite kudasai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Please pretend that you think he made a mistake

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たことにしてください
examples.sentence: 彼女が帰ったことにしてください。
examples.translation: Let’s pretend that she has gone home.
examples.translationEn: Let’s pretend that she has gone home
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga kaetta koto ni shite kudasai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Let’s pretend that she has gone home

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たら Verb たで
examples.sentence: 行ったら行ったで大変だし、行かなかったら行かなかったで後悔しそうだ。
examples.translation: If I go, it’s a hassle; if I don’t go, I’ll regret it.
examples.translationEn: If I go, it’s a hassle; if I don’t go, I’ll regret it
examples.romaji: Ittara itta de taihen da shi, ikanakattara ikanakatta de kōkai shisō da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I go, it’s a hassle; if I don’t go, I’ll regret it

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たら Verb たで
examples.sentence: 買ったら買ったでお金がなくなるし、買わなかったら買わなかったで後で欲しくなる。
examples.translation: If I buy it, I’ll run out of money; if I don’t buy it, I’ll want it later.
examples.translationEn: If I buy it, I’ll run out of money; if I don’t buy it, I’ll want it later
examples.romaji: Kattara katta de okane ga naku naru shi, kawanakattara kawanakatta de ato de hoshiku naru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I buy it, I’ll run out of money; if I don’t buy it, I’ll want it later

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たら Verb たで
examples.sentence: 作ったら作ったで食べきれないし、作らなかったら作らなかったでお腹が空く。
examples.translation: If I cook, I can’t finish it all; if I don’t, I’ll be hungry.
examples.translationEn: If I cook, I can’t finish it all; if I don’t, I’ll be hungry
examples.romaji: Tsukuttara tsukutta de tabekirenai shi, tsukuranakattara tsukuranakatta de onaka ga suku.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I cook, I can’t finish it all; if I don’t, I’ll be hungry

examples.grammarPoint: Verb たら Verb たで
examples.sentence: 旅行に出かけたら出かけたで疲れるし、家にいたらいたで退屈する。
examples.translation: If I go on a trip, I'll get tired, but if I stay home, I'll be bored.
examples.translationEn: If I go on a trip, Ill get tired, but if I stay home, Ill be bored
examples.romaji: Ryokō ni dekaketara dekaketa de tsukareru shi, ie ni itara itada de taikutsu suru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If I go on a trip, Ill get tired, but if I stay home, Ill be bored
